tree.name: Klay Thompson
tree.tradeDescription: 6-team sign-and-trade: GSW traded Klay Thompson to DAL; CHA traded 2025 2nd (Johni Broome) to DAL; DAL traded Josh Green to CHA; DAL traded 2031 2nd (PHI own) to PHI; DEN traded Reggie Jackson, 2029 2nd, 2030 2nd to CHA; DEN traded 2025 2nd (Alex Toohey) to MIN; GSW traded cash + 2031 2nd to MIN; MIN traded Kyle Anderson to GSW; PHI traded Buddy Hield to GSW.
tree.note: 5x All-Star, 4x champion. 3yr/$50M deal. 2011 #11 overall pick by Golden State.

assetsGivenUp.name: Josh Green
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted #18 overall by Dallas in 2020 out of Arizona. Sent to Charlotte as part of 6-team Klay Thompson sign-and-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2031 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: DAL's own 2031 2nd round pick. Sent to Philadelphia as part of 6-team Klay Thompson sign-and-trade.
